>更新时间：2026.07.11

# 微信支付 - 微信支付分（普通服务商）文档索引

> 微信支付分是基于用户身份、支付行为等综合评估的信用分值，支持免押租借、先享后付等场景。支持先免、先享两种模式，帮助商户降低门槛、提升转化，订单资金可通过分账完成分配。

## 接入指引
- [产品介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012586132.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012586139.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012586134.md)
- [开发接入准备](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012586133.md)
- [错误码](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4020807411.md)

## API 列表
- [创建支付分订单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138534.md)
- [查询支付分订单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138559.md)
- [取消支付分订单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138589.md)
- [确认订单回调通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012586137.md)
- [完结支付分订单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138598.md)
- [修改支付分订单金额](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138819.md)
- [同步支付分订单状态](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138975.md)
- [支付成功回调通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012586136.md)
- [申请退款](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138987.md)
- [查询退款](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013139077.md)
- [退款结果通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012586138.md)
### 拉起支付分小程序确认订单页

- [iOS](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012607508.md)
- [鸿蒙](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015271745.md)
#### 小程序调起支付分确认订单页
- [wx.openBusinessView](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012607510.md)
- [wx.navigateToMiniProgram（停止新增）](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012607511.md)

#### 小程序调起支付分订单详情页
- [wx.openBusinessView](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012607516.md)
- [wx.navigateToMiniProgram（停止新增）](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012607517.md)

## 请求示例
- [修改支付分订单金额 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138819-curl.md)
- [修改支付分订单金额 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138819-java.md)
- [修改支付分订单金额 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138819-go.md)
- [创建支付分订单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138534-curl.md)
- [创建支付分订单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138534-java.md)
- [创建支付分订单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138534-go.md)
- [取消支付分订单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138589-curl.md)
- [取消支付分订单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138589-java.md)
- [取消支付分订单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138589-go.md)
- [同步支付分订单状态 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138975-curl.md)
- [同步支付分订单状态 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138975-java.md)
- [同步支付分订单状态 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138975-go.md)
- [完结支付分订单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138598-curl.md)
- [完结支付分订单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138598-java.md)
- [完结支付分订单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138598-go.md)
- [查询支付分订单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138559-curl.md)
- [查询支付分订单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138559-java.md)
- [查询支付分订单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138559-go.md)
- [查询退款 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013139077-curl.md)
- [查询退款 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013139077-java.md)
- [查询退款 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013139077-go.md)
- [申请退款 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138987-curl.md)
- [申请退款 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138987-java.md)
- [申请退款 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013138987-go.md)
